events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are asked to assess structural welding on a production floor. The scenario: visible undercut/porosity/incomplete fusion. Work stage: rough-complete. Reference: AWS D1.1. We need to output JSON with decision, risk, etc.

Interpretation: The weld has defects (undercut, porosity, incomplete fusion). According to AWS D1.1, these are unacceptable defects. The work is roughed in but not closed out, so it's still in progress but the defect is present. The component condition is "installed-defective" because it's installed but defective. Decision: fail, because it's non-compliant and dangerous. Risk: high or critical? Undercut, porosity, incomplete fusion can compromise structural integrity, so risk is high. Work stage: rough-complete. Percent complete: maybe 80%? But we need a number. Since it's roughed in, maybe 70-80%? I'll estimate 75. Value: no numeric reading, so 0. Sound source: not applicable. Confidence: high, 0.95. Event time: 0. Rate: 0. Order: empty list. Workable: empty list. Findings: list of defect cues: "undercut", "porosity", "incomplete fusion". Actions: "Reject weld, remove defective section, re-weld per AWS D1.1 procedures." Rationale: "Visible weld defects per AWS D1.1 are unacceptable; structural integrity compromised." References: ["AWS D1.1"]. Component conditions: ["installed-defective"].

So JSON:

{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["undercut", "porosity", "incomplete fusion"],
  "actions": ["Reject weld, remove defective section, re-weld per AWS D1.1 procedures."],
  "rationale": "Visible weld defects (undercut, porosity, incomplete fusion) are unacceptable per AWS D1.1, compromising structural integrity.",
  "references": ["AWS D1.1"]
}

I'll set sound_source to empty string, order and workable to empty arrays. Confidence 0.95. Event time 0, rate 0. Percent complete: I'll use 75. Value 0.
